title: Mix Document
description: The single contract between the UI, the intent engine, and the audio core. Every layer of Stereo Splitter produces or consumes this document and nothing else: the web UI emits it as the render payload, the chat assistant emits it as its only output, and the offline renderer (and, later, the real-time executor) executes it. Stripped of any song-specific data it doubles as a shareable recipe. No layer talks to another except through this schema.

version.description: Mix Document schema version. Optional for now — servers tolerate its absence and assume v1.

stems.description: Per-stem placement settings, keyed by stem name (e.g. vocals, drums, bass, other).

stem.description: Placement and level settings for one stem. Only `mode` is required; omitted fields fall back to server-side defaults.

gain_db.description: Stem gain in dB. 0 = unchanged volume.

haas_ms.description: Haas delay in milliseconds for `wide` mode.

rate_hz.description: Sweep/orbit rate in Hz for `autopan` and `eightd` modes.

depth.description: Pan sweep depth for `autopan` and `eightd` modes. 0 = static, 1 = full width.

sync_beats.description: Beats per full sweep/orbit, tempo-synced to the detected BPM. Overrides `rate_hz` when set; null disables tempo sync.

global.description: Master effects applied to the summed mix.

speed.description: Playback speed multiplier (pitch follows, like real slowed edits). 1.0 = original speed.

reverb.description: Synthesized hall reverb amount. 0 = dry, 1 = maximum.

loudness_match.description: Match the render's loudness to the original, with a transparent soft limiter.
